name: Kubernetes Secrets Enumeration
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Leo Tsaousis (@laripping)
SIGMA Title: Kubernetes Secrets Enumeration
SIGMA Description: Detects enumeration of Kubernetes secrets.

False positives:
- The Kubernetes dashboard occasionally accesses the kubernetes-dashboard-key-holder secret

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%list%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%secrets%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Kubernetes Secrets Enumeration on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%list%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%secrets%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.
